text: Lesson 131
Don't be so sure!
Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 聽錄音，然後回答這個問題。

text: What's the problem about deciding on a holiday?
zh: 决定假期的问题出在哪里？
zh_hant: 決定假期的問題出在哪裡？

text: Where are you going to spend your holidays this year, Gary?
zh: 加里，你今年打算去哪里度假？
zh_hant: 加里，你今年打算去哪裡度假？

text: We may go abroad.
I'm not sure.
My wife wants to go to Egypt.
I'd like to go there, too.
We can't make up our minds.
Will you travel by sea or by air?
zh: 你们打算坐船还是坐飞机？
zh_hant: 你們打算坐船還是坐飛機？

text: We may travel by sea.
It's cheaper, isn't it?
may be cheaper, but it takes a long time.
zh: 可能是便宜些，但很花时间。
zh_hant: 可能是便宜些，但很花時間。

text: I'm sure you'll enjoy yourselves.
zh: 我相信你们会玩得开心的。
zh_hant: 我相信你們會玩得開心的。

text: Don't be so sure.
We might not go anywhere.
zh: 我们可能哪儿都去不成。
zh_hant: 我們可能哪兒都去不成。

text: My wife always worries too much.
Who's going to look after the dog?
Who's going to look after the house?
Who's going to look after the garden?
We have this problem every year.
zh: 我们每年都会遇到这个问题。
zh_hant: 我們每年都會遇到這個問題。

text: In the end, we stay at home and look after everything!
zh: 到头来，我们还是待在家里，什么都得照看！
zh_hant: 到頭來，我們還是待在家裡，什麼都得照看！
